description: You are a physical oceanography instructor preparing a lab module on ENSO. Your lab preparation request is on the desktop at ~/Desktop/hovmoller_lab_brief.txt. Using NASA Panoply and the SST climatology data in ~/PanoplyData/sst.ltm.1991-2020.nc, create a baseline climatological Longitude-Time (Hovmöller) diagram at the Equator (Latitude = 0). Deliver the exported PNG visualization and a structured text report analyzing the diagram to ~/Documents/HovmollerLab/. Ensure you read the lab brief carefully for the required output formats and questions.
